feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: ironlabs
entry.content: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Generate interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files. Powered by Mermaid.js. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, class diagrams, state machines, timelines, mind maps, git graphs, pie charts, and quadrant charts. Dark mode, step-through reveal, and export built in.

entry.title: ywc-agent-toolkit
entry.content: YWC skill distribution toolkit for Claude Code — 26 skills covering planning, commits, PR creation, spec writing, code review, security audit, and development workflows

entry.title: dominicode-sdd-creator
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development, adaptación de Dominicode — genera spec.md + plan.md + tasks.md (TDD) antes de escribir código.

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: monskills
entry.content: Skills for developing apps on Monad. Assists LLM with frontend, smart contract deployment, and deploying to production

entry.title: volcengine
entry.content: Skills for Volcengine (火山引擎) scenarios: cloud resource operations (ECS/VPC/VKE/CLB/RDS/Redis/TOS), deployment, IaC, and SDK code generation.

entry.title: carta-cc
entry.content: Maps, connects, and remembers your documentation. Structural scanning, LLM semantic audit, Qdrant embedding, and semantic search.

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: clinpub
entry.content: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Personal Claude Code harness — pipeline orchestration, specialized agents, and engineering-discipline hooks.

entry.title: agent-webbridge
entry.content: Clean-room, open-source (MIT) browser automation for AI agents. Drives the user's real Chrome with its live login sessions across multiple Chrome profiles in parallel — and, unlike typical browser bridges that share one global current tab, attaches chrome.debugger per tab so N tabs in one profile run concurrently. No closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: honestweek
entry.content: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entry.title: mtv-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills for MTV/Forklift VM migrations, OpenShift health checks, KubeVirt management, Prometheus metrics, and vSphere automation

entry.title: repo-proof
entry.content: Verified READMEs + real demos for Claude Code. Runs a repository's README quickstart in a sandbox, corrects documentation errors (never masking real code bugs), and captures real demos. Provides /proof verify and /proof demo.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: arbor
entry.content: Run Arbor's hypothesis-tree research workflow inside Claude Code using your own model — no API key. Bundles the Arbor Agent Skill suite and registers the keyless `arbor mcp` tools (Idea Tree, evaluation, worktrees, guarded merges, reports).

entry.title: hunter
entry.content: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data -- directly in Claude.

entry.title: obsidian-knowledge
entry.content: Claude Code plugin that manages an Obsidian knowledge vault: capture, organize, index, and garden

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: agentic-starter-kits-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for agentic-starter-kits contributors.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: cortexloop
entry.content: One-command post-coding pipeline with health scores, trend dashboard, baseline ratchet, self-improving playbook learning loop, GitHub Action, and CI output

entry.title: clover
entry.content: Protect your coding agent experience — Clover silently threat-models every plan, surfaces missing security requirements, and folds them in before code is written.

entry.title: junjak-ai-harness
entry.content: TypeScript-first multi-agent team workflow harness for Claude Opus — greenfield project bootstrap (deep-research → scaffold → profile), 5-phase TDD workflow with agentic + human-QA testing layers, lifecycle-managed 3-bucket document storage with an LLM wiki, YAGNI code-minimalism, instinct-based learning, and ultracode Workflow orchestration

entry.title: xorio
entry.content: xorio development toolkit — dev workflows, testing, cleanup, polish, review, security

entry.title: claude-kit
entry.content: James's collection of Claude Code primitives — hooks and other configurable bits.

entry.title: epic
entry.content: 3 commands + 19 auto-trigger skills + self-evolving agent harness. Less to remember, more automation.

entry.title: cosmobar
entry.content: Fast, dependency-light status line for Claude Code — installs the binary and guides setup.

entry.title: scaffolding
entry.content: 11 agents, 35 skills, 18 commands, 9 hooks — spec-driven multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code, with optional cross-device semantic memory.

entry.title: financial-analysis
entry.content: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: insane-search
entry.content: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents — adaptively accesses blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn) without API keys. Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation and auto dependency install.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP, commands, and skill capabilities.

entry.title: commercetools
entry.content: Build commercetools solutions faster

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: universal-dev-standards
entry.content: Skills for development standards: commit messages, code review, testing, documentation, and more. Supports 25 comprehensive skills for the full development lifecycle.

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: Dev10x
entry.content: v0.80.0 — 69 skills for structured commits, PR lifecycle, branch hygiene, ticket management, task tracking, code review, scoping, and QA automation in Claude Code.

entry.title: enforce-mode
entry.content: Always-on universal engineering rules + project-aware domain rules with PECK v3 level-aware advisory guidance (never blocks or denies — every check approves and injects context) and a Grounded-Generation Layer that traces every external API call back to a researched source (UNVERIFIED flag when it can't), reducing hallucination. Detects 41 domains across 12 lifecycle phases via weighted signal scoring. Modular pattern architecture with per-pattern severity (WARN/STRICT/CRITICAL) mapped to levels (solo/team/prod). Ships 28 tech-stack-aware department subagents (ground-truth-backed, research-before-code) that realize the CLAUDE.md routing map out of the box.

entry.title: config-lsp
entry.content: Language Server Protocol configuration for Claude Code

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.title: leadbay
entry.content: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep on your Leadbay account.

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — session management, memory recall/save, and setup tools

entry.title: gcd
entry.content: Knowledge skill for Google Cloud Dedicated (GCD) - sovereign cloud platform. Provides guidance on GCD-specific services, authentication, Terraform, and key differences from public Google Cloud.

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: blueprint
entry.content: Architecture Decision Records with teeth — 40 commands, 21 agents, 15 architecture paradigms. DDD bounded contexts, DCAR forces evaluation, reflexion model conformance, epistemic status tracking, Wardley strategic analysis, C4 diagrams, ATAM tradeoff analysis, risk heat maps, cross-repo federation, and configurable governance tiers. All with a cranky senior engineer persona.

entry.title: scratch
entry.content: Fn-level code index MCP server. Splits source files into per-function body files for token-efficient navigation, with a persistent per-file scratch note for agent memory. Watcher re-splits on source change.

entry.title: devforge-ai
entry.content: Tracer bullet SDLC plugin: 10 agents across 5 phases (plan, build, verify, ship, operate), 34 knowledge skills, 10 commands. Ralph Loop self-correction, Linear issue integration, scope.json as single source of truth.

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks for Claude Code: recall on session start, ingest on stop, and device login.

entry.title: drydock
entry.content: Transforms Claude Code from raw code generation into a full production-ready engineering system. 15 specialized agents cover architecture (12-Factor + Clean Architecture), API-first contracts, tested backend/frontend, observability & telemetry, security-by-default, CI/CD + supply-chain hardening, automated testing, performance budgets, feature flags, developer experience, and per-product regulatory compliance (SOC 2 / GDPR / HIPAA / PCI-DSS) — plus security audit + VAPT (OWASP 2025 / API / LLM Top 10) — from idea to ship. 11 of the 15 agents run as real isolated subagents (auto-discovered from agents/) orchestrated via the Task tooling; the orchestrator and three planning agents run in-context as skills. Enterprise-grade by default and evidence-grounded with anti-hallucination guardrails.

entry.title: bruhs
entry.content: End-to-end development lifecycle: scaffold projects, plan and build features, verify behavior with evidence, ship PRs, walk reviewers through changes, watch CI to green, address review comments, clean up after merge, audit codebases, surface architectural deepenings, recap shipped work. Use when starting a project, implementing a feature, verifying a fix, shipping code, reviewing PRs, addressing review feedback, merging, auditing code quality, or summarizing shipped work.

entry.title: arcade
entry.content: Dynamic tool discovery and execution across 500+ Arcade tools (Slack, Gmail, GitHub, Google Calendar, Notion, Linear, Dropbox, and more) over a single MCP connection. Ships an operator subagent, skills, and slash commands so the discovery loop stays out of your main conversation.

entry.title: skill-smith
entry.content: Thin meta-skill that creates other Claude Code skills to an industry-leading, tested-real bar. Use when you want to author a new skill, batch-create a series of skills, scaffold a Skill-Repo-Spec-conformant skill repo, optimize a skill's triggering description, or stand up a create -> evaluate -> iterate pipeline. It is research-first (delegates landscape + frontier-design recon to market-intel so every skill is designed against the state of the art), does deterministic Skill-Repo-Spec v1 scaffolding, enforces a hard anti-self-deception acceptance gate (eval lift vs baseline, held-out trigger rate, system-prompt token budget, cross-library dedup, security audit, spec conformance, single-responsibility focus), then hands the accepted skill to self-evolve for regression-gated auto-iteration; batch mode fans out many candidates under a global library-budget manager. Delegates generation depth, evaluation rigor, and iteration to existing tools rather than reimplementing them.

entry.title: agentic-development-workflow
entry.content: Per-feature development lifecycle: design, launch, build, wrap.

entry.title: qweather
entry.content: Weather query — real-time weather, forecasts, and life indices (QWeather)

entry.title: alp
entry.content: Personal engineering plugin — skills, agents, workflows for daily development

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: capybaraa
entry.content: Calm senior-dev mode for Claude Code: clarify before code (curated ASCII questions and edge cases), stay lean, write optimal code, spend tokens proportionally, finish terminally, leave the repo clean.

entry.title: gooseworks
entry.content: 100+ data tools for scraping, research, lead generation, and enrichment. Search Twitter/X, Reddit, LinkedIn, find emails, enrich companies, and more — all from your coding agent.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,642 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: claude-agent-sdlc
entry.content: Multi-agent workflows for Claude Code: development, testing, debugging, and review.

entry.title: observe
entry.content: Agent skills and MCP configuration for deploying and managing Observe's observability infrastructure

entry.title: stata-code
entry.content: Agent-native Stata bridge for Claude Code. Drive DiD/IV/RDD and publication-ready esttab tables in plain language, then cross-validate each estimate against StatsPAI. Bundles an MCP server (18 tools, 14 workflow prompts, token-economy result schema, typed errors, multi-session) and an agent skill with an on-demand Stata reference library that teaches Claude how to call it idiomatically.

entry.title: metrognome
entry.content: The autonomous performance engineer for React Native. Orchestrates metro-mcp and Callstack's agent-device, agent-react-devtools, and react-native-best-practices into one propose → measure → keep/revert loop — with an interactive 3D Perf Map, a live HTML run report, configurable commit mode, and per-repo performance memory.

entry.title: confluence-cli
entry.content: Agent-friendly Confluence Cloud CLI with JSON output, semantic exit codes, CQL search, batch operations, and workflow commands.

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: kevin
entry.content: Talk like Kevin from The Office. Fewest words that carry the meaning. Governs prose only — code, commits, and PRs stay plain.

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entry.title: agentbus
entry.content: Local message bus for AI agent sessions. Discover other running sessions on your machine and message them directly. SQLite bus, pluggable triggers, MCP channel delivery — no daemon, no network.

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: research-leakproof
entry.content: Catch data leakage, inflated sample size, shape-collapse, and over-claimed metrics in any ML or research project, without leaving Claude Code.

entry.title: sketch
entry.content: Integrate Sketch with your workflows. Includes the Sketch MCP server and skills to explore and organize documents, generate code from designs, create designs from code, and more.

entry.title: marketing-offers-tool
entry.content: SvelteKit tool for marketing teams to manage aggregator offers (Wolt, Bolt) and track offer performance.

entry.title: frontend-craft
entry.content: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams, including frontend skills, subagents, hooks, and MCP integration for Figma/Sketch/MasterGo/Pixso/墨刀/摹客. All reports auto-saved as Markdown files.

entry.title: goal-setter
entry.content: Draft or activate compact Codex goals for verifiable long runs. Defines the result, evidence, constraints, stop rules, limited clarification, and only worthwhile extra review or separate threads.

entry.title: pop-quiz
entry.content: A surprise pop quiz for developers: after the agent implements something for you, it springs an oral exam on the concepts, terms, and design tradeoffs of the work — so you actually understand what was built and why, and make better decisions next time.

entry.title: tiun-sdk
entry.content: Teaches AI coding agents how to integrate and debug the tiun SDK (@tiun/sdk) for authentication and subscription billing.

entry.title: numberlabs
entry.content: Author and validate numberlabs reconciliation configs locally with the openrecon CLI, then drive them against a live tenant through the Flow Service API MCP server.

entry.title: minimax-skills
entry.content: MiniMax AI skills library for frontend, fullstack, Android, iOS, shader, GIF sticker, document, presentation, spreadsheet, and multimodal media workflows

entry.title: tilelang2ascend-ops-developer-skills
entry.content: TileLang2AscendC 算子自动生成 Skills（7 个）。TileLang 设计、AscendC 转译、Case 精简、性能分析、精度调优、Trace 记录。

entry.title: tree-sitter-language-pack
entry.content: Parse and extract code intelligence from 300+ programming languages with tree-sitter — structure, imports, symbols, and syntax-aware chunking.

entry.title: tokenash
entry.content: Tokenash startup hooks for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.

entry.title: pypto-op-orchestrator
entry.content: PyPTO 算子端到端开发 Team。7 阶段状态机编排，含 3 个 Subagent，支持断点续跑和失败恢复。

entry.title: sonarr
entry.content: Search, add, and monitor TV series in Sonarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, history, and quality profiles. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: tool-conventions-cmd
entry.content: Scaffold a new TypeScript CLI tool's documentation and configuration, or audit an existing tool against the project tool-conventions (docs/tools/<name>.md format, ~/.tool-agents/<name>/ config folder, four-tier env-var resolution chain, vendor-canonical LLM provider names, no-fallback rule). Bundles the /tool-conventions command and its tool-doc-config-architect subagent.

entry.title: react-effect-event
entry.content: Use React's useEffectEvent to separate reactive dependencies from non-reactive "latest value" reads inside Effects, fixing stale closures and effects that re-run more than they should. React 19.2+.

entry.title: liter-llm
entry.content: Universal LLM API client for 143 providers — chat, streaming, tools, embeddings, search, OCR, plus an OpenAI-compatible proxy and an MCP server.

entry.title: assumptions
entry.content: Assumption Archaeologist — surfaces load-bearing implicit assumptions baked into code ("always UTC", "already sorted", "user is authenticated here") into a living ASSUMPTIONS.md with stable IDs and a status lifecycle. Command-driven only; never runs automatically, so it never spends tokens unless you ask.

entry.title: legion-codex-mode
entry.content: The Codex-CLI-primary routing brain for Legion: you are GPT-5.5 doing most of the work, and this skill tells you WHEN to hand a task up to Claude via `legion-claude` (deep architecture, polished/complex frontend with the impeccable skill, final cross-model review, tie-breaks, or when you're stuck) versus doing it inline — with automatic GPT-5.5 fallback if the Claude limit is hit. The mirror image of legion-router (the Claude-primary brain). Also maps what runs natively on Codex (MCPs, mirrored skills, bridged commands/agents) so you don't reach for Claude needlessly.

entry.title: campaign-vault
entry.content: Build and refresh the Pappy & Co Campaign Data Vault: a single self-contained, on-brand live-artifact HTML dashboard of past marketing-campaign performance across Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, Klaviyo (email) and Attentive (SMS), organized by campaign theme (Sweepstakes, Cigar Releases, Vault Opening, Holiday & BFCM, Mixers, …) with year-over-year comparison, a day-level campaign calendar, a two-period Compare tool, and a planning view. Aggregated and PII-free.

entry.title: ops-code-reviewer
entry.content: Ascend C 算子代码审查 Team。含独立审查 Agent，支持 PR diff 审查和代码质量评估。

entry.title: model-infer-skills
entry.content: NPU 模型推理优化原子 Skills（11 个）。覆盖框架适配、并行策略、KVCache/FA、融合算子、图模式、精度/运行时调试、多流、预取和 SuperKernel。

entry.title: rustarr
entry.content: Connects Claude Code to the rustarr MCP server — one tool surface over a media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Tautulli, Overseerr, qBittorrent, SABnzbd, Plex, Jellyfin, and more). Also bundles standalone per-service skills (sonarr, radarr, prowlarr, overseerr, sabnzbd, qbittorrent, plex, jellyfin, tautulli, tracearr, bazarr) that drive each service's REST API directly as an offline fallback when the MCP server is unavailable.

entry.title: legion-setup
entry.content: One skill to install AND update the Legion marketplace — no team hand-holding. First run installs marketplace plugins, cross-harness skills, Codex and Cursor bridges, shared CLIs, and daily refresh/self-learning; after that the same skill updates to latest. Ships `legion-setup`, `legion-codex-setup`, and `legion-cursor-setup`.

entry.title: mise-en-place
entry.content: Mirepoix's agent behavioral contract — five principles (Karpathy four + Justified Action / Five Whys per ADR-016) + 8 operating modes + 5 Mirepoix addenda (including multi-agent review). Activates as a skill that elicits the active mode from the operator at session start.

entry.title: sandbox-auth
entry.content: Authenticate outbound network calls from inside a sandbox running behind a MITM egress-proxy + gateway auth-webhook (e.g. SandboxedOstoolsMcpServer). Tokens are injected server-side and the agent never holds them. A common egress-auth skill owns the wire contract (HTTP 511 auth_pending handshake, 403 deny), backoff polling, human-in-the-loop device-code relay, and a portable Python probe engine; thin user-invocable skills (connect, azure-devops, microsoft-graph) reference and invoke it with service-specific probe URLs, scopes, and endpoints.

entry.title: agora
entry.content: Build apps on the Agora SDK (@agora-sdk/*): provider+hooks model for comments, reactions, feeds, auth, chat, spaces — plus the fork's divergences from upstream Replyke. Skills look things up via a bundled API surface, the consumer's installed .d.ts, and (optionally) the Replyke docs, so they work offline.

entry.title: whitebox-testing
entry.content: White-box testing skill with path coverage, cyclomatic complexity, decision-path analysis, dataflow path coverage, and test generation for Python/JS/Java/C.

entry.title: grok-it
entry.content: Claude Code plugin that exposes Grok x_search, image generation, and video generation through a local MCP server.

entry.title: debugging
entry.content: Log-first debugging methodology using structured JSONL logs queried with DuckDB. Includes debugging workflows, logging enablement for codebases, logging compliance review with calibrated Trace-coverage recommendations for AI-assisted debugging, and systematic root-cause debugging.

entry.title: overseerr
entry.content: List, search, create, approve, and decline media requests in Overseerr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: speedpr
entry.content: Automate the current working branch to 'Ready To Merge' status. Auto-detects phase (A:uncommitted → B:unpushed → C:no PR → D:PR exists), handles review threads via GitHub GraphQL, CI failures, and merge conflicts. Supports /loop for polling and an `auto` argument to enable automatic merging.

entry.title: ascendc-ops-lab-developer
entry.content: Ascend C 算子自动生成 Team。通过双路径（design.md / TileLang）设计表达和 AscendC 转译优化，端到端完成算子开发（7 Phase 工作流），含 1 个专业 Agent 和 9 个配套 Skill。

entry.title: artemis-recon
entry.content: Artemis Recon — walks Claude Code through authorized red-team reconnaissance of AI assets (chatbots, agents, LLM-powered features).

entry.title: haunt-mcp
entry.content: Adds Haunt MCP web extraction: permitted public URL to clean JSON, Markdown, article fields, metadata, and usage checks.

entry.title: torch-npugraph-ex-skills
entry.content: PyTorch 昇腾 NPU npugraph_ex Skills（6 个）。覆盖图模式知识、代码模板、问题分诊、编译错误、运行时错误和自定义算子入图。

entry.title: qbittorrent
entry.content: List, add, pause, resume, and remove torrents and check transfer stats in qBittorrent via its WebUI API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: clean-builds
entry.content: Achieve zero-warning builds through systematic warning elimination, code formatting, and package version validation

entry.title: developer-performance-review
entry.content: Developer performance review skill for analyzing work over time (weeks/months)

entry.title: tautulli
entry.content: Read Plex viewing activity, watch history, home stats, and users from Tautulli via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: comment-rot
entry.content: Detects comment rot. Comments that no longer match the code they describe after edits. Uses layered semantic analysis (heuristics + code summary + LLM agent review) instead of regex, so it catches logic-vs-comment contradictions a normal linter cannot.

entry.title: code-reviewer
entry.content: Code review toolkit with specialized agents for duplicate detection, EUII leak scanning, exception handling review, test coverage review, design simplification, code simplification, over-engineering / scope-creep detection, architecture review, performance review, schema and wire-contract compatibility review, severity grading quality gate, log review, and PR work item context gathering. Includes a review-pr command that auto-detects tech stack and publishes findings to Azure DevOps.

entry.title: radarr
entry.content: Search, add, and monitor movies (and collections) in Radarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, quality profiles, and root folders. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: tilelang-op-orchestrator
entry.content: TileLang-Ascend 算子端到端开发 Team。3 阶段状态机编排，含 3 个 Subagent，支持设计回退、断点续跑和失败恢复。

entry.title: tracearr
entry.content: Query Tracearr's public API for media tracing and analytics. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: orleans-dev
entry.content: Microsoft Orleans patterns, best practices, and code review for virtual actor model applications — covers grain design, concurrency, cross-grain communication, streams, and serialization.

entry.title: ops-direct-invoke
entry.content: Ascend C Kernel 直调算子开发 Team。含完整工作流（设计→实现→审查→性能验收）、3 个专业 Agent 和工程模板。

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: conference-organizing-knowledge-skill
entry.content: Google Docsとして公開されている「カンファレンス開催ノウハウ」をSkill化して公開しているプラグイン。3日ごとに自動同期される。

entry.title: sabnzbd
entry.content: View, pause, resume, and manage the SABnzbd Usenet download queue and history via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: ado
entry.content: Azure DevOps integration for work item management, PR publishing, iterative PR tending, autonomous work item implementation, and autonomous backlog processing. Orchestrates development methodology skills via the development plugin.

entry.title: legion-orchestrate
entry.content: Legion's dynamic MULTI-MODEL orchestrator — the ultracode loop (decompose -> fan out -> cross-model verify -> synthesize -> gate) made executor-aware: Opus conducts, GPT-5.4 does the bulk of coding in PARALLEL, GPT-5.5 verifies. Ships `legion-fanout` (run many scoped slices in parallel across executors via legion-delegate, collect verified diffs + cost, report) and a SKILL playbook with an LEGION_ULTRACODE max-exhaustive mode (wide fan-out, multi-vote cross-model verify, loop-until-dry). Ties together routing.toml + legion-delegate + legion-share to deliver features with codex carrying >=50% of the work.

entry.title: coding-posture
entry.content: Task-aware working modes for coding agents — debug, fix, review, test-first, refactor, optimize, migrate, upgrade, integrate, spike, unstuck

entry.title: review-code-change
entry.content: Review the diff of the current git branch against a target branch, checking only changed code against a set of extensible standards (security, performance, business logic, React/Next.js/Node/TypeScript). Read-only git.

entry.title: receipts
entry.content: Make your coding agents prove their work: a recorded visual-QA walkthrough + the reasoning behind a PR, packaged into one receipt a human can judge in ~90 seconds. Bundles the `receipts` skill; the CLI lives in the repo.

entry.title: sync-skills
entry.content: Reconcile skills between ~/.agents/skills/ (authoritative) and ~/.claude/skills/ (runtime). Creates Windows directory junctions (mklink /J) for missing entries, migrates orphan real directories across scopes, repairs wrong-target junctions, and backfills ~/.agents/.skill-lock.json for migrated entries. Supports --scope global|project and --dry-run.

entry.title: legion-router
entry.content: Legion's multi-model brain: delegate scoped tasks from Opus to external model agents (Codex / GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.4 and Cursor Agent) and bring back a verified, metered diff. Ships `legion-delegate` for Codex, `legion-cursor` for Cursor Agent headless runs, the `legion-router` loopback :8082 Anthropic-compatible metering proxy (claude-* / minimax-* pass-through + /ingest), plus the shared cost table and codex-json parser. One orchestrator, a legion of models.

entry.title: react-compiler
entry.content: Write React components and hooks that are fully compatible with React Compiler's automatic memoization: pure components, no props/state mutation, side effects out of render, and no manual useMemo/useCallback/React.memo.

entry.title: jellyfin
entry.content: Check server status, active sessions, libraries, and items in Jellyfin via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entry.title: model-based-design-core
entry.content: Foundational Model-Based Design capabilities for the Simulink product family

entry.title: cs-ceo
entry.content: CS 시리즈 CEO 오케스트레이터 — 공수 추정 후 CS-test/CS-plan/CS-codebase-review/cs-design/cs-smart-run 자율 배분. v5.5: Dynamic Resolve v2 — 파트너 타입(AGENT/SKILL/PROTOCOL) 자동 감지, 외부 플러그인 에이전트 직접 호출 지원.

entry.title: code-craftsmanship
entry.content: Code quality and software design skills including Clean Code (Robert C. Martin), Refactoring patterns (Martin Fowler), A Philosophy of Software Design (John Ousterhout), The Pragmatic Programmer (Hunt & Thomas), Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans), and Working Effectively with Legacy Code (Michael Feathers)

entry.title: pent-test-buddy
entry.content: Penetration-testing assistant for Claude Code. Scaffolds a scope-governed engagement workspace, intakes Rules of Engagement via a relentless scope interview, gates every action against scope.md, and runs a raw -> knowledge-base distillation pipeline so Claude reads what it already learned instead of re-running scans.

entry.title: story-import
entry.content: 逆向导入已有小说。将已写好的小说（半成品或完本）反向解析为标准项目目录结构，兼容后续写作流程。

entry.title: win-customers
entry.content: Understand buyers, package value, create demand, and sell. Validate ICP, Grand Slam Offer, $100M Leads, Breakthrough Advertising, Conversation-First Outreach, Challenger Sale, JOLT Effect, and Key Person of Influence help win customers end-to-end.

entry.title: aco
entry.content: Drive a live Appium session from Claude Code with the aco CLI — start/stop sessions, find elements, tap, swipe, type, screenshot, read page source, switch web contexts, and call platform mobile: extensions on iOS simulators/emulators and real devices.

entry.title: stromy
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entry.title: qe-framework
entry.content: QE Framework v7 — Claude-first SIVS loop with full lifecycle hooks, 182 skills, and optional Codex bridge.

entry.title: crawlie
entry.content: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entry.title: kreuzberg
entry.content: Local document extraction: text, tables, metadata, images from 91+ formats with optional OCR.

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Manage Asana from the terminal with the `asana` CLI — tasks, projects, sections, subtasks, comments, dependencies, followers, tags, attachments, custom fields, and CSV/JSON batch import.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entry.title: xberg-enterprise
entry.content: Managed Kreuzberg document intelligence on api.xberg.io — async extraction with OCR, URL crawling, presigned uploads, document versioning and diffing, signed webhooks, and usage tracking.

entry.title: claude-code-stack
entry.content: Orchestration stack: foreman + subagents, session/handoff skills, cost & brevity guardrails, and design/data toolchains. Skills are gated at runtime by .claude/stack-config.json.

entry.title: cc-transcript
entry.content: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts, run now via /goal or droid exec, or queued in docs/goals), dispatch (factory orchestrator for the docs/goals queue), loop-architect (design autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor).

entry.title: pkg-sync
entry.content: Mirror a locally-developed npm package into another project's node_modules (no symlinks, no package.json edits) when testing unpublished local changes across separate repos.

entry.title: ui-craft
entry.content: Design engineering skill + system for AI coding agents: anti-slop UI, outcome recipes, spec-driven design, design-review + a11y agents, MCP quality gates.

entry.title: gander
entry.content: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entry.title: hmd
entry.content: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entry.title: xsolla-ai-kit
entry.content: Xsolla agent skills toolkit — guided, end-to-end workflows for merchant setup, catalog design, Login/NewID, Pay Station, webhooks, storefront build, and shop branding, calling Xsolla REST APIs directly.

entry.title: board-steward
entry.content: Live project kanban for Claude Code. Auto-tracks shipped / fixed / deferred work as cards on a board.json + live HTML board (127.0.0.1:7891), survives sessions via a SessionStart digest, auto-links edited files to their cards, and backstops un-carded work on Stop. Bootstraps a fresh board by mining past session history.

entry.title: claude-code-rescuetime
entry.content: Log which project and branch you work on in Claude Code to your RescueTime timeline as Highlights. Hook-based, no daemon, stdlib-only Python.

entry.title: shipwright
entry.content: The operating doctrine for autonomous build-and-ship work: the loop to run, which sibling skill to reach for and how they chain, and the disciplines that keep the work honest. Loaded when about to build/code/ship or run a self-directed work loop, so a fleet of agents ships the same way. Sits above fixer / perfection / walkabout / honesty / decisions / brainstrust — not a router, the method that runs while you use them.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: atlas
entry.content: Turn a stated need into a full system design by mining the Atlas knowledge graph.

entry.title: waitbus
entry.content: Workstation-local event bus + blocking wait/emit primitive for agents: wait on or emit CI, pytest, Docker, filesystem, and Prometheus Alertmanager events without polling, plus a third-party plugin API (`waitbus.sources.v1` entry-point group) for custom sources. GitHub Actions is source #1, with sub-second matrix-cell failure detection via workflow_job + workflow_run.

entry.title: klaussy
entry.content: Claude Code boilerplate generator — scaffolds CLAUDE.md (path-scoped), namespaced .claude/skills/<repo>-<skill>/, settings, hooks, and PR template. Includes plugin-level klaussy-init and klaussy-update skills plus an MCP server.

entry.title: kreuzcrawl
entry.content: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

entry.title: ai4comms
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for AI4comms branded deliverables

entry.title: astroneval
entry.content: Skill 评测插件。引导用户对本地 Skill 进行自动化评测，支持单 Skill 验证、多 Skill 横评、多模型横评、运行框架横评等场景。

entry.title: vanguard-frontier-agentic
entry.content: Cloud and zero-trust agentic workflow marketplace for skills, agents, rules, MCP references, and compliance-aware architecture.

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: fizzy
entry.content: Fizzy integration for Claude Code. Manage boards, cards, track work, and link code to projects.

entry.title: voicemode
entry.content: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech

entry.title: discord
entry.content: Discord channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

entry.title: temper
entry.content: Temper: Quality gates, blast radius analysis, and intent-driven development for AI-generated code

entry.title: lightningrod-python-sdk
entry.content: Lightningrod Python SDK — forecasting dataset generation and model fine-tuning skills

entry.title: darkroom
entry.content: Darkroom Engineering AI coding standards. Layered config with portable AGENTS.md, progressive complexity, and two-tier knowledge system.

entry.title: beacon
entry.content: Accessibility + AEO inspection for Claude Code. Lighthouse-style 0-100 scoring across 10 categories, interactive HTML reports, jurisdiction-aware WCAG context, framework-specific fixes, and a PostToolUse hook that auto-checks a11y when you edit UI files.

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: my-skills
entry.content: Personal development workflow skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, verification, review, and Codex integration

entry.title: atopile-dev
entry.content: Design electronics with atopile's declarative DSL (ato). Provides language reference, package creation guides, and electronics design workflows for AI agents working with .ato files and PCB design.

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 11 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 1 security skill + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, refactoring, adversarial review, documentation, dependency updates, security audits, performance optimization, incident response, test suite creation, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: claude-mem-lite
entry.content: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entry.title: superctx
entry.content: All the context, in one place for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and AI coding tools.

entry.title: marcopolo
entry.content: Secure, persistent remote workspace for analytics, dashboards, and automations across one or more company data connections

entry.title: storyforge
entry.content: AI-powered book writing pipeline: brainstorm, concept, plot, characters, chapters, export

entry.title: llm-wiki
entry.content: Cross-project bridge to a locally-installed LLM-wiki. Read your compiled knowledge from any project, diagnose pipeline health, contribute back (capture, ingest, hard facts), run maintenance, or report engine bugs upstream. Ships the use-llm-wiki skill; the wiki CLI itself comes from the llm-wiki engine.

entry.title: talon
entry.content: 71-skill bug-hunting & external red-team bundle for Claude Code — 48 hunt-* web/vuln-class + framework skills, enterprise platform attack chains (M365/Entra, Okta, SharePoint, vCenter, SSL-VPN, APK), recon/OSINT, reporting & validation gates, and Burp MCP integration. Skills auto-load by topic; 15 slash commands included.

entry.title: shipwright-preview
entry.content: Local browser preview for Shipwright projects — starts dev server and shows URL

entry.title: property-research
entry.content: Generate self-contained HTML property research reports — full analysis pages, interactive parcel maps (Leaflet + satellite), easement route maps with toggles, and phased building permit timelines. Produces the same dark-themed, data-dense reports used for Commonwealth Ave (Polk County FL) and Aibonito PR research.

entry.title: shipwright-test
entry.content: Run unit tests, E2E tests, smoke tests, and security scans for Shipwright projects

entry.title: witty-diagnosis-agent
entry.content: An intelligent diagnostic agent for EulerOS system troubleshooting and analysis

entry.title: shipwright-changelog
entry.content: Generate changelogs from Conventional Commits, create tags, and manage PRs

entry.title: squatch-cc
entry.content: Squatch.cc — a working system for Claude that actually holds up: search your own session history, decompose a rough idea into a spec, scaffold projects, keep your own local codebooks, and author your own skills — auto-activating, no commands to memorize — with an egress-guard that keeps secrets, PII, and private content from ever leaving the machine.

entry.title: squatch-tools
entry.content: A few genuinely useful, credential-free MCP tools for everyone: context7 (live library docs), sequential-thinking (structured reasoning), and Playwright (browser automation). Portable npx installs — nothing machine-specific.

entry.title: agentlens
entry.content: Community Edition. Always-on local dashboard for your Claude Code, Cowork & Cursor work: live sessions, sub-agents, tokens, 4-way data provenance and an ULTRACODE strategy view, plus a self-enriching AI feed. Fully local: no hooks, no bundled MCP servers, no telemetry. Advanced token-optimization & the nightly self-improvement engine are available in AgentLens Pro.

entry.title: research-and-grill
entry.content: Research any topic from the web, then get grilled with Socratic questions. Scales question depth to how much was researched.

entry.title: shipwright-design
entry.content: Generate UI mockups from IREB specs — standalone HTML screens and user flows

entry.title: react-conventions
entry.content: Build React data fetching, mutations, and forms the right way. Matches the codebase's existing approach; prescribes React Query and React Hook Form + Zod only when no pattern exists. Adds Next.js client/server boundary guidance when App Router is detected.

entry.title: shipwright-iterate
entry.content: Complexity-adaptive SDLC for ongoing changes. Auto-detects intent + complexity, scales from quick fix to structured feature with specs, plans, reviews, and testing.

entry.title: claudeqb
entry.content: Evidence-backed Claude Code planning with project comprehension, autopsy, ontology, ledger continuity, traceability, gate integrity, QA audit, and gated handoff.
